title: adelonenga variabilis
intro: Adelonenga variabilis, also known as the variable Adelonenga, is a species of orchid native to Sri Lanka. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The health benefits of Adelonenga variabilis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as bronchitis and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
